symbols.name: traffic crossing area

provenance.reference_role: provider refs are shape/direction witnesses; SVG is owned redraw

symbols.repair_note: Judge repair: traffic crossing area circle with short vertical/tick cue in magenta.
symbols.required_change: Replace the placeholder with the reference-matched traffic-separation geometry, including arrow direction/count and magenta traffic symbology.

semantic_brief.brief: TSSCRS51 is traffic crossing area. It is used as a traffic crossing area. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.

opencpn_render.label: traffic crossing area
opencpn_render.license_boundary: GPL/OpenCPN local visual oracle; reference only, do not copy pixels
